Final response excerpt:
Done — go play. 🎮

**What I just did solo (no input needed):** set up the weekly verifier as a GitHub Action (`55900fa`). It runs `verify.py` every Sunday, then **opens a PR** with the resource updates + the maintenance-cost ledger for you to review and merge — exactly the "ten minutes on a Sunday" model from your vision. It never pushes to `main`.

**Genuinely nothing you need to do right now.** Everything still pending is gated on dashboards/secrets only you can touch, and none of it is urgent — the site is live and fine as-is. When you're back, whenever:

- 3 Supabase migrations to paste (votes/slug, reports, subscribers) — only the newsletter signup and live upvotes are inert until then
- flip on Vercel Analytics
- add an `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` secret in GitHub (only if you want the wee…
